name: Jayne Lankford
bio: Jayne Lankford serves as the Mayor of Mineola, a charming city in Wood County known for its historic downtown, nature preserve, and the Mineola Nature Preserve trail system. The mayor works with the city council to promote tourism, community development, and quality of life.
campaignPromises: Promote Mineola's nature preserve and outdoor recreation
Attract new residents and businesses to Mineola
Maintain efficient and responsive city services
